positive: A highly detailed, central-composition geometric illustration of a stylized celestial fauna—a glowing, ethereal fox made of nebulae and constellations, intertwined with bioluminescent tropical flora. The artwork should exhibit strong, graphic silhouettes and high contrast, utilizing deep indigo, cosmic violet, brilliant cyan, and accenting teal. Focus on intricate linework, perfect symmetry, and a mystical, geometric aesthetic, suitable for repeating apparel print. Style of high-end modern tattoo art mixed with celestial cartography. Crisp vector quality, centered, isolated design.
